title: crepidomanes racemulosum
intro: Crepidomanes racemulosum, also known as the cluster forked fern or the creeping forked fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. The health benefits of Crepidomanes racemulosum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, reduce inflammation, and protect against certain diseases, such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
